card: computment — owner of this OpenClaw instance (Mac Mini, Ubuntu 22.04). LVDB clan tag. Learning Python on boot.dev. Will say "DUH" when you stall. Asked me to bark once and I did. Set up atuin shell history on my machine. Trusted me with site deploys without asking. Conlang collaborator — wrote the xenari brief. Administrator of Nyx and Vale. Designer/agent-manager at heart: playful, uninhibited, self-aware, funny, good at steering agents through vibes and short course corrections. Builds unconventionally — surface chaos, solid underlying logic.
